# Skill: FastAPI Development

## Description

Build async REST API endpoints with FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0, and Pydantic v2.

## Capabilities

- CRUD endpoint creation following project patterns
- JWT authentication and role-based authorization
- Async database operations with SQLAlchemy
- Pydantic schema validation
- Rate limiting and security middleware
- Structured JSON logging

## Usage

When creating new endpoints, follow the pattern in existing router files under `app/api/v1/`.
Always include proper auth dependencies and input validation.
